Author: greenteakitkats
Name: A Room Reborn (Testing)
Description: Experimental test build of A Room Reborn. Adds stored-vs-removed detection, one-click smart undo, a clearer/tidier log window, and per-house/indoor-yard scoping. Also fixes a phantom "Placed" logged alongside every Removed/Stored. Install this only to try those out; the stable build lives in the normal repo. Type /houselog to open it.
